name: Lower Navarrese Basque
notes: Lower Navarrese (Behe-Nafar). Spoken in Basse-Navarre (France). Shares aspiration and plosive aspiration features with Souletin but less systematic. Fully productive /h/. Intermediate between southern (Spanish-side) and eastern (Souletin) varieties.

sources.author: Hualde, J.I. & Ortiz de Urbina, J. (eds.)
sources.title: A Grammar of Basque

sources.author: Ladefoged, P. & Maddieson, I.
sources.title: The Sounds of the World's Languages
